seo.title: YouTube to FLAC (lossless compressed) – YTMP3
seo.description: Convert YouTube to FLAC lossless (compressed) with YTMP3. Preserve 100% original audio quality with smaller file size than WAV. Free, fast, and unlimited.

hero.title: YouTube to
hero.subtitle: Download YouTube music as FLAC lossless (compressed) – original audio quality with smaller file size than WAV.

sections.content: YouTube to FLAC is the process of extracting audio from a YouTube video and converting it into FLAC (Free Lossless Audio Codec) format. FLAC is a lossless compressed audio format, meaning the sound quality is preserved at 100% of the original source while reducing file size compared to uncompressed formats.
How is FLAC different from MP3 and WAV?

items: Compared to MP3: FLAC does not remove any audio data. Even high-quality formats like MP3 320kbps are still lossy and discard some information.
Compared to WAV: FLAC keeps the same audio quality but reduces file size by around 40–50% compared to uncompressed WAV.
When you want to archive high-quality music long-term.
When editing or processing audio without quality loss.
When you use high-end headphones or speakers.
When you want lossless quality without huge file sizes.

sections.content: If you only need audio for casual listening, you may prefer the lighter formats on our YouTube to MP3 page.
Why use YTMP3 for YouTube to FLAC conversion?

items: 100% Free: No registration, no usage limits.
True lossless: Audio data is fully preserved.
Efficient compression: Smaller than WAV, same quality.
Cross-platform: Works on Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android.

sections.content: How to convert YouTube to FLAC

items: Paste it into the YTMP3 converter.
Select FLAC as the output format.
Click "Convert" and download your FLAC file.

sections.content: Is FLAC the highest possible audio quality?
FLAC preserves the original audio quality perfectly, but it is still a compressed format. If you need fully uncompressed audio, please see WAV.
Is FLAC suitable for long-term storage?
Yes. FLAC is open-source, lossless, and can be converted into other formats later without any quality loss.
iOS supports FLAC playback, but for best compatibility with the Apple ecosystem, you may also consider M4A (AAC).

items.question: Is YTMP3 free for YouTube to FLAC conversion?
items.answer: Yes. Completely free, no registration required, no subscription needed.

items.question: What does "lossless" in FLAC mean?
items.answer: Lossless means the audio is compressed without losing any data. When decompressed, it is identical bit-for-bit to the original.

items.question: Is FLAC better than MP3?
items.answer: Yes, in terms of quality. FLAC preserves 100% of the original audio while MP3 discards data. However, FLAC files are larger than MP3 320kbps.

items.question: What's the difference between FLAC 16-bit and 24-bit?
items.answer: 24-bit has a higher dynamic range (144dB vs 96dB) and is used for Hi-Res audio. 16-bit/44.1kHz is CD quality and sufficient for most listeners.

items.question: Can I play FLAC on my device?
items.answer: Yes. FLAC is natively supported on Windows 10, macOS, iOS, Android, and most modern audio players. For broader compatibility, consider M4A.

items.question: How much smaller is FLAC than WAV?
items.answer: FLAC typically reduces file size by 40-50% compared to uncompressed WAV while maintaining identical audio quality.

items.question: Does YTMP3 store my data?
items.answer: No. All conversions are temporary, and no personal data is stored.

items.question: Is FLAC good for archiving music?
items.answer: Yes. FLAC is ideal for archiving because it's lossless, open-source, and can be converted to any format later without quality loss.
